name: Rhubarb Crisp
recipeInstructions:
1. Place the rhubarb in a greased dish.
2. Sprinkle with sugar, spices and water.
3. In a separate bowl, cream the butter until smooth.
4. Gradually add white sugar to the butter mixture.
5. Blend in flour and oats until well combined.
6. Spread the crumb topping evenly over the rhubarb.
7. Bake at 375 degrees Fahrenheit for 35-40 minutes.
